data.title: One year after CrowdStrike outages, traveler concerns over flight disruptions at all-time high, leading to thousands of delays and cancellations worldwide.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on July 18, 2025, it will have been a year since the CrowdStrike outage that resulted in numerous flight delays and cancellations globally. This incident was part of a series of disruptions travelers have encountered in the past year. The outage impacted thousands of flights and caused inconvenience for many passengers, highlighting the significance of technological vulnerabilities in the airline industry.

data.title: Shiba Inu's price rises 10.5% in 1 week fueled by new Shytoshi AI paper, potentially entering a bullish phase.
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is seeing a surge in activity following the introduction of the new Shytoshi AI paper, sparking rumors that SHIB might be on the cusp of a new bullish period. The latest cryptocurrency price trends over the past week show Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001497, marking a 10.5% increase. Additionally, Dogecoin (DOGE) is at $0.2449, up 21.6%, and Pepe (PEPE) is at $0.00001341, up by 5.2%. Notably, crypto expert CJ has highlighted Shiba Inu's chart formation as a potentially significant development, indicating ripe bid zones for lucrative entries. Despite nearing local resistance levels, the overall pattern suggests substantial potential growth if the current momentum is sustained. data.title: SEC Chair Atkins supports including cryptocurrencies in 401(k) plans, stresses education is vital for investors.
data.description: The Chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission, Paul Atkins, has hinted at the possibility of incorporating cryptocurrencies into 401(k) retirement plans. Emphasizing the significance of educating investors, Atkins expressed a willingness to explore the inclusion of digital assets in these plans. This move could potentially open up new investment opportunities for individuals planning for retirement.

data.title: Agilysys to report Q2 2025 earnings on 2025-07-21, EPS anticipated at $0.32. Past performance showed stock price increased by 22.1% last quarter. Current stock trading at $119.39, up 4.94% in the past year. Analysts rate Agilysys as Buy with a one-year price target of $115.
data.description: Agilysys (AGYS) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on 2025-07-21, with analysts anticipating an EPS of $0.32. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement and hoping for surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. Last quarter, the company exceeded EPS by $0.25, leading to a 22.1% increase in share price the following day. Agilysys' stock was trading at $119.39 on July 17, with a 52-week increase of 4.94%. Analysts have given Agilysys a consensus rating of Buy, with an average one-year price target of $115.0. This information is crucial for investors to understand market sentiments and industry expectations.

data.title: Medpace Hldgs (NASDAQ: MEDP) to release quarterly earnings report on Monday, 2025-07-21, with analysts expecting EPS of $2.99. Shares at $319.16 show a 28.02% decrease over 52 weeks. Analyst consensus rating for Medpace Hldgs is Neutral.
data.description: Medpace Hldgs (NASDAQ: MEDP) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on July 21, 2025. Analysts expect an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.99. In the last quarter, the company beat EPS estimates by $0.59, resulting in a 2.32% drop in share price the following day. The stock was trading at $319.16 as of July 17, down 28.02% over the past 52 weeks. Market sentiments are mixed, with 3 analyst ratings giving a neutral consensus. Investors are eager for news of surpassing estimates and favorable guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can impact stock price movements.

data.title: Reform UK faces backlash as Labour MP pushes to ban crypto donations after Nigel Farage's party starts accepting them.
data.description: Last month, Nigel Farage's political party, Reform UK, introduced a policy accepting donations in cryptocurrencies. Recently, a Labour Member of Parliament has proposed banning this practice.

data.title: NICB cautions Central NC post-Tropical Storm Chantal, warns of contractor fraud; floods hit homes, businesses. #NorthCarolina #NICB
data.description: In Oak Brook, Illinois on July 18, 2025, Tropical Storm Chantal has caused significant flooding in Central North Carolina, leading to the destruction or severe damage of numerous homes, schools, and businesses. The National Insurance Crime Bureau (NICB) has initiated a response to assist in the aftermath of this catastrophic weather event.

data.title: QuickBooks Online named top bookkeeping software for 2025 by Expert Consumers, recognizing its advanced features.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Expert Consumers, well-known for software and business tool reviews, announced QuickBooks Online as the leading solution in their latest report on top bookkeeping software for 2025. This acknowledgment showcases the platform's cutting-edge features and innovations in the industry.

data.title: USPS unveils schooner stamped card at Minnesota Stamp Expo on July 18, 2025, making it easier to send postcards with prepaid postage.
data.description: In Crystal, Minnesota on July 18, 2025, the U.S. Postal Service unveiled a new schooner stamped card at the Minnesota Stamp Expo. This card showcases a two-masted schooner sailing on open water and serves as a practical option for sending postcards with prepaid postage. This release marks the latest addition to the Postal Service's collection of stamped cards, adding a touch of maritime beauty to the selection available to customers.

data.title: Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) to hold conference call on July 31, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. to discuss Q2 financial results.
data.description: In Toronto on July 18, 2025, Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) announced plans for a conference call and live audio webcast scheduled for 1:00 p.m. (ET) on Thursday, July 31, 2025. The call will focus on financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The results are set to be disclosed on Wednesday, July 30, 2025, post-market hours. Stakeholders are encouraged to join the call to engage with management, including an opportunity for analysts to ask questions following the presentation.
